nodes.label: Sanad Legal Dashboard
nodes.description: Sanad — daily operations dashboard for Saudi lawyers and law students, covering compliance, cases, tasks, documents, and invoicing.

nodes.label: Sanad Deployment Guide
nodes.description: Production deployment guide covering quick start, system requirements, deployment options, SSL, database, PWA, and security checklist.

nodes.label: Quick Start Setup
nodes.description: Five-minute bootstrap: git clone, bun install, copy .env, bun run db:push, optional seed, ./deploy.sh build, ./deploy.sh restart; serves at http://localhost:3000.

nodes.label: Direct Bun Deployment
nodes.description: Option A — runs the server via ./deploy.sh deploy as a background Bun process logging to logs/sanad-out.log; simple but no auto-restart.

nodes.label: PM2 Deployment
nodes.description: Option B — recommended production deployment using PM2 with ecosystem.config.cjs for auto-restart, log management, clustering, and monitoring.

nodes.label: Systemd Deployment
nodes.description: Option C — dedicated-server deployment via /etc/systemd/system/sanad.service running .next/standalone/server.js with auto-restart.

nodes.label: Caddy Reverse Proxy
nodes.description: Caddyfile-based reverse proxy to localhost:3000 with automatic Let's Encrypt HTTPS and Brotli compression.

nodes.label: Nginx + Certbot
nodes.description: Alternative HTTPS setup using Nginx as reverse proxy with Certbot-managed SSL certificates.

nodes.label: SQLite Database
nodes.description: Default zero-config database stored at db/custom.db, backed up by file copy, suitable for up to ~100 concurrent users.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL Option
nodes.description: Multi-user/enterprise database alternative requiring DATABASE_URL update and bun run db:push migration.

nodes.label: PWA Service Worker
nodes.description: Progressive Web App support via public/manifest.json and public/sw.js, enabling install on desktop/mobile and offline read access.

nodes.label: NextAuth Authentication
nodes.description: next-auth is installed but not configured; requires NEXTAUTH_URL/SECRET env vars and provider config at src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts.

nodes.label: Security Checklist
nodes.description: Security posture: HTTPS, security headers, HSTS, no powered-by, restricted SW scope; pending items include auth, firewall, fail2ban, backups.

nodes.label: Sanad File Structure
nodes.description: Project layout: Next.js App Router with 35 API routes, 15 sanad feature views, shadcn/ui components, Prisma schema, deploy.sh, ecosystem.config.cjs, Caddyfile.
